[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101000 2
1 011110000 4
2 110001001 4
3 001010110 4
4 001011011 5
5 100011000 3
6 010000111 4
7 110011111 7

01 10 001100001 3
12 21 000111110 5
23 32 011011000 4
34 43 101111001 6
45 54 110101000 4
56 65 001101100 4
67 76 101111101 7
70 07 101000111 5

02 20 001011111 6
13 31 011100110 5
24 42 110100001 4
35 53 011010001 4
46 64 111000100 4
57 75 100010001 3
60 06 000111010 4
71 17 100100110 4

03 30 010000111 4 match 6
14 41 110011111 7 match 7
25 52 000001001 2
36 63 010111101 6
47 74 010111001 5
50 05 001010110 4 match 3
61 16 001011011 5 match 4
72 27 100011000 3 match 5

04 40 111111110 8
15 51 000110111 5
26 62 001100101 4
37 73 111000000 3
